cir.text: <circuit name> Example Circuit </circuit> <comp name="Source" ref_des="V1"> <value>220V AC</value> </comp> <resistor name="R1" ref_des="R1"> <value>1k</value> </resistor> <resistor name="R2" ref_des="R2"> <value>1k</value> </resistor> <resistor name="R3" ref_des="R3"> <value>2.2M</value> </resistor> <resistor name="R4" ref_des="R4"> <value>1k</value> </resistor> <capacitor name="C1" ref_des="C1"> <value>1000uF</value> </capacitor> <capacitor name="C2" ref_des="C2"> <value>0.22uF</value> </capacitor> <diode name="D1" ref_des="D1"> <value>1N4007</value> </diode> <zener name="D2" ref_des="D2"> <value>12V</value> </zener> <led name="LED1" ref_des="LED1"> </led> <transistor type="NPN" name="Q1" ref_des="Q1"> <type>BC547</type> </transistor> <transistor type="PNP" name="Q2" ref_des="Q2"> <type>BC557</type> </transistor> <triac name="TRIAC1" ref_des="TRIAC1"> <type>BT136</type> </triac> <button name="PB1" ref_des="PB1"> </button> <connection name="Load"> <type>Load</type> </connection> </circuit>
